description: Sasha hovers over the 'Borrow more money' radio option while considering the reason for refinancing.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Why are you refinancing?' step of the loan application.

description: Sasha clicks into the 'Amount' input field to enter the loan value.
frame_description: The cursor is placed inside the empty Amount text box.

description: Sasha types '1' into the Amount field before pausing.
frame_description: The character '1' appears in the Amount field.

description: Sasha types '500,000' into the refinancing amount field.
frame_description: The Amount field is updated to show '$ 500,000'.

description: Sasha hovers over the 'Loan Term' dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the dropdown currently set to '30 years'.

description: Sasha selects the 'No' option for taking cash out using property equity.
frame_description: The user clicks the radio button next to 'No'.

description: The 'No' radio button state changes to selected.
frame_description: The radio button fills in to indicate selection.

description: Sasha clicks the 'Next' button to proceed with the application.
frame_description: The Next button is activated.

description: The application navigates to the Welcome/Email login screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the form to a centered login modal.

description: Sasha clicks into the 'Email Address*' field.
frame_description: The cursor focuses on the email input field.

description: Sasha hovers over the Unloan logo in the top left corner.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the top left of the page.

description: The screen flashes white and returns to a previous step of the application form.
frame_description: The login modal disappears and the 'Tell us about your loan' page loads.

description: The page content updates to show borrower name input fields.
frame_description: Fields for 'What's your first name?' and 'What's your co-borrower's first name?' appear.

description: Sasha hovers over the 'income' step in the sidebar navigation.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the left-hand progress menu.

description: Sasha hovers over the co-borrower warning message.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the yellow alert box.

description: Sasha scrolls down the page to view more form content.
frame_description: The page content shifts vertically.

description: The page content transitions to the 'Let's find your property' section.
frame_description: New form fields for property address and value appear.

description: The page content transitions to the 'Before you begin' summary section.
frame_description: A summary of eligibility criteria is displayed.

description: The page content transitions to 'What's the purpose of your loan?'.
frame_description: The screen shows a heading asking for the loan purpose.

description: Product cards for 'Live in' and 'Invest' loans appear on the screen.
frame_description: Two large cards with interest rates and features animate into view.

description: Sasha clicks the 'View full product features >' link.
frame_description: The user clicks the text link below the product cards.

description: The page navigates to the detailed 'Unloan Features' page.
frame_description: The screen loads a new page with the heading 'Unloan Features'.

description: Sasha performs a long, continuous scroll down the features page to review interest rates and loan details.
frame_description: The user scrolls through sections on variable rates and loan details.

description: Sasha hovers over 'application fees' in the list of zero fees.
frame_description: The cursor points to the first item in the fee list.

description: Sasha hovers over 'account keeping fees' in the list.
frame_description: The cursor moves down the list of fees.

description: Sasha continues scrolling to the bottom of the features page, reviewing redraw and top-up information.
frame_description: The user reaches the footer of the page.

description: Sasha switches focus from the browser to the Lookback task instruction window.
frame_description: The screen displays the user testing task description.

description: Sasha hovers over the 'End Task' button in the Lookback overlay.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the button to finish the session.
